titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Coeducation, Yale University, Records and Memorabilia
Coeducation, Yale University, Records and Memorabilia
titlestmt.author: compiled by Michael Lotstein

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.
This collection contains 111 published digital objects.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Saturday June 13, 2026 at 03:02

did.unittitle: Coeducation, Yale University, records and memorabilia
did.abstract: The collection consists of memorabilia and interviews from the first women students admitted to Yale College in 1969.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Coeducation, Yale University, records and memorabilia (RU 1175). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The collection is open for research.

odd.head: General
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 9-H (YRG 9-H), Audio-visual materials and memorabilia documenting Yale College activities.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The collection consists of memorabilia and interviews from the first women students admitted to Yale College in 1969.

did.unittitle: Merideth Wright, Class of 1971, Yale College, photographs and memorabilia

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Vietnam War protest buttons, drawings and signs

did.unittitle: "The Women are Coming! The Women are Coming!" A Yale ballad of 1969 by Deborah Bernick, Class of 1972
Bennett, Kathy with Boothby, Linda Kent and de Peyster, Frances Lee
Hill, Kay with Anderson, Margaret, Ghory, Ann and Lundin, Priscilla
Kaufman, Kelsey with Kurshan, Rachel and Ballantine, Elizabeth
Lazarus, Wendy and Kaufman, Mary Carde
McLeod, Mary and Tsantiris, Susan Brumbaugh
Winant, Joan O'Meara and Zujkowski, Cynthia
Wright, Meredith and Wesnet, Nancy Leinwald
